metadata.description: Environment name — suffix for deterministic resource naming
AI Foundry account name (passed to deploy.sh for RBAC — not used in Bicep)
AI Search service name (existing resource in this RG)
Storage account name (passed to deploy.sh for RBAC — not used in Bicep)
AI Foundry project endpoint for Azure AI Agent Framework
Developer IP address for Cosmos DB portal/local access (empty = private-only)
Package container name for Blob landing zone
Gremlin graph autoscale maximum throughput in RU/s. Azure derives the effective floor from this maximum.
Address space for the VNet (must contain both subnet prefixes)
Address prefix for the Container Apps subnet (/23 minimum required by CAE)
Address prefix for the Private Endpoints subnet
Default TTL in seconds for conversations (7 days = 604800, -1 = disabled)
Developer IP address for portal/local access (empty = no public access)
Gremlin graph autoscale maximum throughput in RU/s. Azure derives the effective floor from this maximum.
Azure region for the private endpoint resource
Resource ID of the VNet (for DNS zone link)
Resource ID of the subnet for private endpoints (snet-private-endpoints)
Resource ID of the Cosmos DB NoSQL account
Name of the Cosmos DB NoSQL account (used for naming PE and DNS link)
Optional resource ID of the Cosmos DB Gremlin account for graph and telemetry traffic
Optional name of the Cosmos DB Gremlin account for graph and telemetry traffic
Key Vault name used for publish-time and runtime secrets
Container Apps Environment resource ID (from container-apps-environment module)
Container Registry name (ACR — used to retrieve login server and admin credentials)
Container image to deploy (initial placeholder; updated by deploy_app.sh)
Target port exposed by the container (nginx listens on 80 in the unified image)
CPU cores allocated to the container
AI Foundry project endpoint (used by Azure AI Agent Framework)
LLM model deployment name (e.g. gpt-4.1, gpt-5.2)
AI Search service name (used to construct endpoint URL)
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity
Client ID of the user-assigned managed identity (for DefaultAzureCredential)
Cosmos DB NoSQL endpoint for session persistence (empty = in-memory)
Cosmos DB Gremlin endpoint hostname for runtime graph access
Cosmos DB Gremlin account name for telemetry access
Optional Key Vault secret URI for the Cosmos Gremlin primary key

containers.name: app
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'LLM_PROVIDER', 'value', 'agent'), createObject('name', 'LLM_MODEL', 'value', parameters('modelDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_AI_PROJECT_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('projectEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_RESPONSES_DEPLOYMENT_NAME', 'value', parameters('modelDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('identityClientId')), createObject('name', 'AI_SEARCH_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(not(empty(parameters('aiSearchName'))), format('https://{0}.search.windows.net', parameters('aiSearchName')), '')), createObject('name', 'SCENARIO_NAME', 'value', parameters('scenarioName')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_SESSION_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('cosmosSessionEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('cosmosGremlinEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_ACCOUNT_NAME', 'value', parameters('cosmosGremlinAccountName')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('cosmosGremlinDatabase')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_GRAPH', 'value', parameters('cosmosGremlinGraph')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_TELEMETRY_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('cosmosTelemetryDatabase')), createObject('name', 'CORS_ORIGINS', 'value', '["*"]'), createObject('name', 'DEBUG', 'value', 'false')), if(not(empty(parameters('cosmosGremlinPrimaryKeySecretUri'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_PRIMARY_KEY', 'secretRef', 'cosmos-gremlin-primary-key')), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('fabricTenantId'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'FABRIC_TENANT_ID', 'value', parameters('fabricTenantId')), createObject('name', 'FABRIC_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('fabricClientId'))), createArray()))]

metadata.description: Container Registry name used for image pull
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity
Client ID of the user-assigned managed identity
Subscription ID used by publish-time Azure management calls
Resource group name used by publish-time Azure management calls
Storage account name for package and report blobs
Key Vault secret URI for the Cosmos Gremlin primary key
Container image to deploy (initial placeholder; updated by deploy_app.sh)

containers.name: publisher
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('identityClientId')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID', 'value', parameters('subscriptionId')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_RESOURCE_GROUP', 'value', parameters('resourceGroupName')), createObject('name', 'GRAPH_DATA_DIR', 'value', '/workspace/graph_data'), createObject('name', 'STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME', 'value', parameters('storageAccountName')), createObject('name', 'STORAGE_PACKAGE_CONTAINER', 'value', parameters('packageContainerName')), createObject('name', 'PACKAGE_BLOB_ROOT', 'value', parameters('packageBlobRoot')), createObject('name', 'STORAGE_REPORTS_CONTAINER', 'value', parameters('reportContainerName')), createObject('name', 'PUBLISH_REPORT_BLOB_ROOT', 'value', parameters('reportBlobRoot')), createObject('name', 'AI_SEARCH_NAME', 'value', parameters('aiSearchName')), createObject('name', 'AI_FOUNDRY_NAME', 'value', parameters('aiFoundryName')), createObject('name', 'PROJECT_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('projectEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'EMBEDDING_MODEL', 'value', parameters('embeddingModel')), createObject('name', 'EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS', 'value', string(parameters('embeddingDimensions'))), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('cosmosGremlinEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_ACCOUNT_NAME', 'value', parameters('cosmosGremlinAccountName')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('cosmosGremlinDatabase')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_GRAPH', 'value', parameters('cosmosGremlinGraph')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_TELEMETRY_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('cosmosTelemetryDatabase'))), if(not(empty(parameters('cosmosGremlinPrimaryKeySecretUri'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'COSMOS_GREMLIN_PRIMARY_KEY', 'secretRef', 'cosmos-gremlin-primary-key')), createArray()))]
